title: Trump says Iran ceasefire proposal 'significant' but 'not good enough' as Hormuz Strait deadline nears
summary_full: The 45-day ceasefire proposal, which could lead to an end to the war, is reportedly being discussed by the U.S., Iran and a group of regional mediators.
summary_public: The 45-day ceasefire proposal, which could lead to an end to the war, is reportedly being discussed by the U.S., Iran and a group of regional mediators.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: Iran ceasefire proposal, which could lead to an end to the war
